manufacturer.description: Official manufacturer or brand name of the equipment as explicitly mentioned in the document. Extract exact manufacturer name from title block, header, product literature, or specification section.

model_number.description: Exact model number of the equipment. Extract full model code without changing characters, hyphens, or prefixes. If multiple model numbers are present, extract the primary model for the current record or use row-wise extraction for table data.

equipment_type_l2.description: Main equipment category (L2). Classify the product into one of the approved L2 categories only. Do not invent new values.

enum: Cook and Hold Ovens and Cabinets
equipment_sub_type_l3.description: Specific equipment sub-category (L3). Choose only from the approved L3 list and ensure it logically matches the selected L2 category.

product_description_mfg.description: Manufacturer product description exactly or closely as written in the literature. Usually found in title, subtitle, overview text, or specification summary. Capture the descriptive product name, not marketing slogan only.

product_literature_date_yr.description: Publication year of the manufacturer literature. Extract only the year in YYYY format. If a full date is present, convert it to year only.

product_line_mfg.description: Manufacturer product line, series, family, or range name associated with the equipment. Extract exact line or family name when explicitly stated.

nema_config.description: Electrical plug or receptacle configuration in NEMA format, such as NEMA 5-15P or NEMA 6-20P. Extract only if explicitly stated.

cord_length_total_ft.description: Total power cord length in feet. Extract numeric value only. Convert inches to feet when clearly stated and use decimal if needed.

shipping_weight_lbs.description: Shipping weight of the equipment in pounds. Extract numeric value only. Convert to pounds if another unit is explicitly given.

installed_weight_lbs.description: Installed, operating, or net weight of the equipment in pounds. Extract numeric value only. Convert to pounds if another unit is explicitly given.

length_in.description: Overall equipment length in inches. First scrape from table. If no table value is found, scrape from diagram, dimensional drawing, or annotated image. Convert mm to inches when clearly given. Extract numeric value only.

width_in.description: Overall equipment width in inches. First scrape from table. If no table value is found, scrape from diagram, dimensional drawing, or annotated image. Convert mm to inches when clearly given. Extract numeric value only.

height_in.description: Overall equipment height in inches. First scrape from table. If no table value is found, scrape from diagram, dimensional drawing, or annotated image. Convert mm to inches when clearly given. Extract numeric value only. If multiple heights are present such as single stack or double stack, choose the standard single-unit height unless schema or context requires otherwise.

production_capacity.description: Numeric production capacity value of the equipment, such as number of trays, racks, meals, pounds, or pieces per hour. Extract numeric part only.

production_capacity_uom.description: Unit of measure for production capacity, such as racks/hr, meals/hr, lbs/hr, trays, pans, or pieces/hr. Extract exact unit text associated with production capacity.

capacity_vol.description: Volumetric capacity numeric value, such as 5, 10, or 20. Extract numeric part only.

capacity_uom.description: Unit of measure for volumetric capacity, such as gal, qt, liter, ltr, cu ft, or oz. Extract exact unit text associated with volumetric capacity.

power_supply_configuration_volts_hertz_p.description: Complete electrical power supply configuration in the format Volts/Hertz/Phase, such as 208/60/1 or 208-240/60/3. Extract exact electrical configuration as stated.

min_circuit_amps_mca.description: Minimum Circuit Amps (MCA) numeric value. Extract only when explicitly stated. If multiple circuits exist, capture the value relevant to the current model or main circuit.

max_over_current_protection_mop.description: Maximum Over-current Protection (MOP / MOCP) numeric value. Extract only when explicitly stated. If multiple circuits exist, capture the value relevant to the current model or main circuit.

heat_type.description: Type of heating source or heating medium used by the equipment. Choose only from the approved list.

nominal_output_heating_gas_mbh.description: Nominal gas heating output in MBH. Extract numeric value only when explicitly stated. Do not confuse with input unless output is clearly indicated.

nominal_output_heating_elec_kw.description: Nominal electric heating output in kW. Extract numeric value only when explicitly stated.
